title: Business Development Representative
description: We're hiring a Business Development Representative at Vanguard. This is an exciting opportunity to join our client-centered, ethical, institutional team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 1-3 years years of experience and are passionate about Asset Management, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Identify and prospect potential customers in target market segments
Conduct product demonstrations and present value propositions to prospects
Build and maintain relationships with key accounts throughout the sales cycle
Track pipeline metrics and provide weekly forecasts to sales leadership
Collaborate with solutions engineers to develop custom proposals
Achieve quarterly revenue targets through consistent prospecting and closing

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Sales, or related field
